author: [NAME]
body: PowerUp is a well-designed and user-friendly app that makes it easy to stay productive and organized. The interface is clean, intuitive, and responsive, making navigation simple even for new users. The app offers useful features that help users achieve their goals efficiently, and its overall performance is smooth and reliable. PowerUp provides a great user experience and shows strong potential for continued growth and improvement.

author: [NAME]
body: There seems to be some bug in the App. When I try to register with my PAN, DOB, Mobile# and Email ID mapped to PAN, I get a message suggesting that some other user with the same credentials has registered already. How could someone else register with my details in the App? Alternatively, the App may not be checking / validating all the 4 unique pieces of information- PAN #, DOB, Email id & Mobile mapped to PAN at the time of registration. Request the tech team to address this issue ASAP🙏
